title: Kimi Code is good at video reasoning with Kimi K2.6 🎬
summary: Kimi Code is a video reasoning tool built on Kimi K2.6 that accepts reference videos and generates .cube LUT (color lookup table) files based on visual queries about colors, shots, or visual style. Users can drag in video references and request specific visual attributes to generate ready-to-use color grading outputs.
writeup: Kimi AI demonstrates Kimi Code, a video reasoning tool built on Kimi K2.6 that analyzes reference videos and generates .cube LUT (color lookup table) files from visual queries about colors, shots, or visual style. The workflow lets users drag in video references and request specific visual attributes, returning ready-to-use color grading outputs. This connects model-level video reasoning to a concrete production artifact, the LUT, used directly in color grading.
